summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were found, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed by the job. Useful open PRs are kept open or routed to maintainer judgment only where the artifact shows supplied proof/green checks or active maintainer-review gates.
